channel.title: Trusty Tadpoles Stake Pool
channel.description: Recent content on Trusty Tadpoles Stake Pool

item.title: About Us
item.description: Trusty Tadpoles is dedicated to Cardano’s decentralization. We offer reliable staking with transparent operations.

item.title: How to Delegate
item.description: Follow these steps to delegate to Trusty Tadpoles using Daedalus or Yoroi: [Link to https://cardano.org/stake-pool-delegation].

item.title: Trusty Tadpoles Stake Pool
item.description:
Trusty Tadpoles

Welcome to Trusty Tadpoles, your trusted Cardano stake pool. Delegate with us to support decentralization and earn rewards.

  • Pool ID: 1fb41965ba01ec521ff34632d05d9450802c291813840c1626d59c0f
  • Ticker: TTP
  • Fees: 3% + 345 ADA fixed
  • Live Stats:

Learn How to Delegate | About Us
